---
title: "Report Archive"
subtitle: "Browse Past Reports"
---

## Reports by Year

### 2025

| Week | Date | Report | Data |
|------|------|--------|------|
| W26 | June 23 | [📄 View](current-report.qmd) | [📥 Weather](../data-downloads.qmd) \| [💧 Soil](../data-downloads.qmd) \| [🌦️ Forecast](../data-downloads.qmd) |

*Archive will be populated as reports are generated each Monday*

---

## Search Reports

Use your browser's search (Ctrl+F / Cmd+F) to find:
- **Station names** (Fayetteville, Marianna, etc.)
- **Metrics** (GDD, soil water, temperature)
- **Weather events** (frost, drought, flooding)

---

## Seasonal Trends

### Spring (Mar–May)
- Frost risk monitoring
- Soil warming
- Planting date readiness

### Summer (Jun–Aug)
- Heat stress
- Water availability
- Crop development stages

### Fall (Sep–Nov)
- Maturity timing
- Harvest conditions
- Season-end analysis

### Winter (Dec–Feb)
- Precipitation patterns
- Season preview

---

## Download Historical Data

Access 30 years of daily weather data for all stations:

[📥 Download 1995–2024 Climate Archive](../data-downloads.qmd#long-term-historical-data)

---

## Report Feedback

Was this report useful? [Send feedback](mailto:eelli@uark.edu?subject=Report%20Feedback)
